diagrams.title: One Dimensional Array Memory Layout
diagrams.description: Shows how elements are stored in contiguous memory locations with their indices and addresses
diagrams.purpose: Understanding contiguous memory allocation and zero-based indexing in C arrays

diagrams.title: Linear Search Visualization
diagrams.description: Demonstrates step-by-step process of searching for element 25 in an unsorted array
elements: Compare with arr[2]=25 - found at index 2
diagrams.purpose: Understanding sequential search algorithm and time complexity

diagrams.title: Binary Search Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows binary search process to find element 23 in a sorted array
elements: Step 1: low=0, high=9, mid=4, arr[4]=30 > 23, high=3
Step 2: low=0, high=3, mid=1, arr[1]=15 < 23, low=2
Step 3: low=2, high=3, mid=2, arr[2]=23 found
diagrams.purpose: Understanding divide-and-conquer approach of binary search and O(log n) complexity
